content_markdown:
## Page: https://vinuni.edu.vn/about-vinuniversity

# About VinUniversity

![About VinUniversity](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/img_introduction-2.png)

About VinUniversity

## Introduction

VinUniversity is a private, not-for-profit university established by Vingroup – the largest private conglomerate in Vietnam, by the Decision No. 1824/QĐ-TTg of Prime Minister of Vietnam, dated December 17, 2019. VinUni aspires to become a university of excellence with a mission to develop talents for the future.

The University has built strategic collaborations with Cornell University and the University of Pennsylvania — a choice that speaks to our commitment to excellence, innovation in research and teaching, and to making a difference in the world.

VinUniversity comprises of College of Arts and Sciences; College of Business and Management; College of Engineering and Computer Science; and College of Health Sciences. Every aspect of the University: its curricula, research, faculty, student body, facilities, and campus life, is developed to meet the highest standards set by the world’s leading accrediting and ranking organizations, such as ABET, AACSB, Quacquarelli Symonds (QS), and Times Higher Education (THE).

The institution has also signed collaboration agreements to offer integrated dual degree with leading universities in computer science, engineering, business management and health sciences.

In October 2020, VinUniversity’s inaugural convocation ceremony was held on its beautiful campus located at Vinhomes Ocean Park, Hanoi, Vietnam. The University was set up with a total investment of VND 6,500 billion (approximately USD 285 million) from Vingroup.

In September 2024, VinUni has become the youngest and fastest university in the world to achieve QS 5 stars, earning 5 stars in 9 categories: global engagement, good governance, programme strength, academic development, teaching, employability, facilities, arts, and social impact.

On March 27, 2025, VinUniversity officially received the FIBAA Institutional Accreditation Certificate from the Foundation for International Business Administration Accreditation (FIBAA). This milestone marks VinUni as the first university in Vietnam to achieve 100% of FIBAA accreditation criteria within just five years of operation.

![Introduction](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/edit-scaled.jpg)

## Our Vision

VinUniversity is a private, not-for-profit Vietnamese university built according to international standards, incorporating the finest models of global higher education. Its objective is to create a breakthrough in the quality of higher education in Vietnam and achieve global recognition within 30 years of its establishment.

![Our Vision](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/DSCF1203-2.jpg)

## Our Mission

The mission of VinUniversity is to train a talented workforce with expertise, skills, personal development, and a dedication to achieving the highest possible effectiveness, contributing to the prosperity of individuals, society, and making a positive impact on the global knowledge-based economy.

![Our Mission](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/DSCF1037-2.jpg)

## Core values

E 

### Empathy

Sense other people’s emotions, understand others without judgement.

C 

### Creativity

Perceive the world in new ways, make connections, generate solutions.

L 

### Leadership Mindset

Motivate and influence people to act toward achieving a common goal.

X 

### Exceptional Capability

Exceptional capabilities and competencies that are proven determinants of future success.

E 

### Entrepreneurial Spirit

Overcome challenges, be decisive, accept responsibility, be impactful for the society.

Developing talents for the future

University of excellence

E 

: Empathy

Sense other people’s emotions, understand others without judgement.

## Our Accreditation - QS 5 Stars

On September 21, 2024, VinUniversity was officially rated a 5-star university by Quacquarelli Symonds (QS), achieving top marks in seven categories including Teaching, Academic development, Internationalization, Social responsibility, Facilities, Arts & Culture and Inclusiveness. As the world’s youngest and fastest university to receive this honor, VinUniversity affirms its strong commitment to building a world-class institution aligned with international standards. This milestone reflects the university’s vision to transform higher education in Vietnam and achieve global recognition within 30 years, while developing a skilled and dedicated workforce for national and global prosperity.

![Our Accreditation - QS 5 Stars](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/VinUniversity_Certificate_2024_page-0001-scaled.jpg)

## Our Accreditation - FIBAA

VinUniversity has officially been awarded the FIBAA Quality Seal by the FIBAA Accreditation and Certification Committee of the Foundation for International Business Administration Accreditation (FIBAA), becoming the youngest university in Vietnam to fully meet 100% of the quality criteria, with 40% exceeding expectations, particularly in Research, where 5 out of 6 criteria surpassed standards. Achieving this international accreditation within just five years marks a significant milestone in VinUni’s pursuit of educational excellence and global recognition.

![Our Accreditation - FIBAA](https://vinuni.edu.vn/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Untitled-design-17.png)

## VINUNI’S MILESTONES

Let’s look back at the milestones on the journey of VinUniversity to build the first university of excellence in Vietnam.

Previous

2025

### January, 2025

VinUniversity received a Certificate of Commendation from the Minister of Education and Training in recognition of its outstanding achievements and contributions in scientific research and application. This honor highlights the university’s strong commitment to academic excellence and its strategic emphasis on impactful research that delivers practical, meaningful solutions for the community and society.

### March, 2025

On March 13, VinUniversity and Nanyang Technological University (NTU) signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to establish a strategic, comprehensive, and long-term partnership. The collaboration will focus on key areas including Computer Science, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence, Engineering, Robotics, Materials Science, and Health Sciences, implemented through six action programs: faculty exchange, joint research centers and groups, recruitment of postdoctoral fellows and PhD students, co-organization of scientific and technological conferences, and the development of research laboratory infrastructure.

### March, 2025

VinUniversity has officially been awarded the FIBAA Quality Seal by the FIBAA
Accreditation and Certification Committee of the Foundation for International Business
Administration Accreditation, becoming the first university in Vietnam to fully meet
100% of the quality criteria, with 40% of these criteria exceeding the required standards,
particularly in Research, where 5 out of 6 criteria surpassed expectations.

### June, 2025

VinUniversity officially announced its second-phase development strategy, with the ambitious vision of becoming one of the world’s top 100 universities. VinUniversity’s phase 2 strategy is built on two core pillars: enhancing academic and research infrastructure while strengthening academic talent to meet global benchmarks. At its core is the “VinUni 500” program, which aims to recruit 500 outstanding global scholars and faculty members, supported by Vingroup’s investment of 9,300 billion VND to expand training capacity and cultivate an world-class research ecosystem in Vietnam.

### October, 2025

Joining forces for Community Health: VinUniversity, Vinmec and Hanoi Medical
University have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) under the witness of
the Minister of Health, marking an important milestone in building a comprehensive
and internationally aligned healthcare ecosystem in Vietnam. The agreement focuses
on education, research, workforce development and expanded clinical training while
promoting joint research in cutting edge medical technologies such as AI, robotics,
and big data.

### November, 2025

VinUniversity was honored with a Certificate of Commendation from the Minister of Education and Training for its exceptional accomplishments in the emulation movement for innovation in management, teaching, and learning during the 2020–2025 period. This recognition affirms VinUniversity’s unwavering efforts to cultivate an exceptional academic environment and its contributions to nurturing high-caliber talent for Vietnam and the world.

2024

### January, 2024

VinUniversity's Bachelor of Nursing program has been officially recognized as a candidate for accreditation by the Accreditation Commission for Education in Nursing (ACEN) in the United States. This recognition serves as evidence that VinUniversity's Bachelor of Nursing program has initially met the rigorous quality training requirements set by ACEN, laying the groundwork for ACEN to initiate the formal accreditation process in 2024.

### June, 2024

VinUniversity’s 3D Medical Technology Center (3D Lab) has officially earned ISO
9001:2015 and ISO 13485:2016 certifications from ISOCERT, making it one of the
few units in Vietnam to achieve international standards in producing 3D- printed
medical devices. This milestone affirms the quality and reliability of the lab’s products,
from 3D anatomical models to fully personalized implants while strengthening its role
in supporting medical training, research and personalized medical practices.

### September, 2024

VinUniversity has officially been awarded a 5-star university rating by Quacquarelli
Symonds (QS), becoming the youngest and fastest university in the world to achieve
this distinction. This important milestone reflects the university’s vision for
transforming higher education in Vietnam, striving toward global standards within 30
years, developing high-quality human resources, and contributing to the knowledgebased economy.

### October, 2024

VinUniversity became the first UNESCO Chair in Vietnam, focusing on environment,
cultural heritage and biodiversity in the country. During the 2024-2028 term, VinUniversity
focuses on research aimed at heritage conservation, biodiversity documentation and the
digitisation of indigenous knowledge through the Metaverse (virtual reality) platform,
transforming it into online learning resources that can be shared widely across Vietnam
and the global community.

2023

### December, 2023

VinUniversity signed a memorandum of understanding with the State Agency for Technology Innovation - Ministry of Science and Technology to promote innovative activities, human resource training, and the development of indices for innovation management and solutions for science and technology management in key national economic sectors.

### December, 2023

VinUniversity signed a memorandum of understanding with Saïd Business School - University of Oxford (ranked #1 in the world according to Times Higher Education rankings) for comprehensive collaboration in training, research, student experience, consulting, and entrepreneurship.

### December, 2023

VinUniversity's VinHeritage Metaverse Museum won third prize at the prestigious QS Reimagine Education Awards 2023 in the category of "Immersive Experiential Learning". It also received the "Outstanding Digital Content Product in Education" Award from the Vietnam

### September, 2023

VinUniversity's Center for Environmental Intelligence received a $250,000 grant from the U.S. National Science Foundation for an initiative called “Global Center for Climate Risk and Resilience: Southeast Asia as a Living Lab” (SEALL).

### July, 2023

VinUniversity's College of Health Sciences was proud to be one of the only two universities in Southeast Asia to achieve ACGME-I international quality accreditation.

### July, 2023

VinUniversity hosted the World Schools Debating Championship (WSDC) 2023 from July 20 to 27, with 65 teams representing 65 countries.

### June, 2023

Over 150 world-renowned professors and scientists from 90 universities, representing 28 countries gathered at VinUni for the 18th International Research Conference on Service Excellence in Management (QUIS18).

### May, 2023

VinUniversity-Illinois Smart Health Center (VISHC) received the Excellence in Sustainable Development Award 2023 from ISCN.

### May, 2023

VinUniversity opened the first Advanced Imaging Education Center (AIEC) in Viet Nam. AIEC was built in accordance with international standards with world leading experts from the UK, USA, Australia... to create an advanced training model that can overcome the limitations of traditional methods.

### April, 2023

To celebrate 5 years of close collaboration with Cornell University (#20 in the world), VinUniversity launched the VinUni-Cornell Knowledge Hub with an aim to promote a culture of lifelong learning.

### April, 2023

VinUniversity offers residency training programs in Orthopaedics that meet international standards, bringing the total number of resident doctor programs to 4 specialties.

### January, 2023

3D Technology in Medicine Center, VinUni was one of the first 3D laboratories in Vietnam to achieve ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management System) and ISO 13485:2016 (Quality Management System for Medical Devices) certification.

2022

### October, 2022

VinUniversity Medical Simulation Center received Provisional Accreditation by the Society for Simulation in Healthcare (SSH) - the world's largest accreditation organization specializing in healthcare simulation training.

### October, 2022

VinUniversity was the youngest university in the Asia-Pacific region to receive 5-Star QS (Quacquarelli Symonds) ratings in 7 categories after only 2 years in operation.

### October, 2022

VinUniversity launched the physical Entrepreneur Lab (E Lab) and celebrated Entrepreneurship Week.

### October, 2022

The College of Business & Management appointed 02 Academic Chairs, who are well-respected professors in their respective fields, and 02 Industry Chairs, who are industry leaders, entrepreneurs, as well as strong advocates for education and nurturing talents.

### September, 2022

VinUniversity College of Business & Management and College of Arts & Sciences signed a cooperation agreement with the Chief of Sales and Marketing Officer Association Vietnam.

### September, 2022

VinUniversity College of Health Sciences and the University of Minnesota School of Nursing (USA) signed a cooperation agreement on academic cooperation and exchange.

### September, 2022

VAIPE - A Smart Healthcare System for Vietnamese People, developed by the research team at VinUni-Illinois Smart Health Center and partners, was announced as one of the winners of the AI Awards 2022.

### August, 2022

VinUniversity signed a cooperation agreement with the University of Queensland (UQ) in Australia for the launching of the integrated Bachelor’s-Master’s Degree program for students at the College of Engineering & Computer Science.

### August, 2022

VinUniversity Nursing Program was eligible to pursue ACEN (U.S.) Candidacy. ACEN is recognized as the leading authority on nursing education accreditation worldwide.

### July, 2022

VinUniversity and the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign announced the opening of the VinUni-Illinois Smart Health Center (VISHC), which focuses on interdisciplinary research in biotechnology and data science. VISHC was officially given 13,5 million USD in funding from Vingroup.

### July, 2022

VinUniversity announced its first Ph.D. in Computer Science program for the academic year 2022-2023, focusing on future technology with major impacts.

### July, 2022

VinUniversity reached agreements with Meliá International Hotels Group, KPMG - one of the world’s four leading auditing firms, and Tiki - Vietnam’s leading e-trade company, providing students with opportunities to experience "real learning - real practice" in the corporate environment.

### June, 2022

Under Vingroup’s "Science and Technology Scholarship Program for Overseas Studies for Master’s and Doctoral Degrees", a scholarship award ceremony for 30 Master's and Doctoral students for the 2022 academic year was held with the announcement of the launching of Vingroup Young Scholars’ Global Network.

### June, 2022

VinUniversity hosted the 1st Annual "Teaching and Learning Summit''. The event focused on innovation in teaching and learning, to reshape Vietnamese higher education in the 21st century.

### June, 2022

Vingroup announced its membership in the Massachusetts Institute of Technology’s (MIT) prestigious Industrial Liaison Program (ILP). VinUniversity will work closely with ILP experts and MIT researchers to promote research and technology development.

### June, 2022

VinUni reached agreements on the integrated Bachelor’s - Master’s program with Penn Engineering, the University of Pennsylvania, and the University of Technology Sydney for students of the College of Engineering and Computer Science.

### May, 2022

VinUniversity Entrepreneurship Lab, together with UpYouth, held TechYouth Startup Day and announced the Incubator Program to support students’ tech startup projects.

### April, 2022

VinUniversity held its first Career Day, with the participation of well-respected businesses like EY, KPMG, Toyota, Corning, AON, Salesforce, SSI, ACB, Viettel, and FPT, together with leading companies in the Vingroup ecosystem - VinFast, Vinhomes, Vinmec, and VinAI.

### April, 2022

VinUniversity signed agreements on Student Exchange programs with the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology in Lausanne, Nyenrode Business University in the Netherlands, Pohang University of Science and Technology in South Korea, University of Toronto - Canada, and Hong Kong University of Science and Technology.

### March, 2022

VinUniversity successfully signed agreements with leading businesses, namely InterContinental Hotels, Techcombank, Woori Bank, FPT Telecom, Vinschool, Vincom Retail, and Vinhomes. Simultaneously, VinUniversity also reached agreements on integrated Bachelor’s - Master’s programs with the University of California San Diego, the USA, and the University of Queensland, Australia.

### February, 2022

Two VinUniversity-funded projects in response to smart healthcare service and smart lighting technology, won research awards totaling 9 billion VND from VinIF.

### January, 2022

VinUniversity and Vincom Center For Contemporary Art (VCCA) hosted the “Future of Time” Art Workshop and Showcase, welcoming the presence of the Winners of the VinFuture Prize on its opening day.

### January, 2022

VinUniversity opened Vietnam’s first Research Center for Biomedical 3D Printing to research and apply the world's latest 3D printing technology in the production of surgical biomedical materials, as well as models for teaching and research.

### January, 2022

VinUniversity and Vietnam-Cambodia Marriott Business Council signed a cooperation agreement on human resources development for the tourism - hospitality industry.

2021

### November, 2021

VinUniversity and Vinmec held a celebration for the first two years of the VinUni - Vinmec alliance as well as appointed the next 60 experts and clinical professionals as new affiliated faculty.

### August, 2021

VinUniversity successfully reached cooperation agreements on the integrated Bachelor’s - Master’s program with University of Pennsylvania, Cornell University, University of California, San Diego, University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, University of Technology Sydney, Australia.

### July, 2021

VinUniversity Global Case Competition (VGCC) 2021 was officially launched. This is an annual competition organized by VinUniversity with support from Cornell University, in order to provide a platform for students to work on real-life problems.

### May, 2021

VinUni’s College of Business and Management established the Industry Advisory Board (IAB). The first 8 members of the IAB are all high-level leaders at leading corporations, including Chairwoman; Chief Executive Officer; Managing Director;… The College of Business and Management has offered many programs to give students the most comprehensive experience of the real professional work environment. These include Industry Speaker Series, Industry Mentorship Program, 5 in 5 Internship, Summer Internship, etc

### February, 2021

VinUni granted funding to 16 Seed-Funding projects in AY 2020-2021. Among these 16 projects, at least 13 projects involved international collaboration.

2020

### December, 2020

In the AY 2020-2021, VinUniversity continued to reach agreements with other leading universities such as Yonsei University, Seoul National University, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology in Lausanne, Western University, University of Technology Sydney. VinUniversity has also signed a cooperation agreement with Vingroup subsidiaries, namely Vinpearl, VinHMS, One Mount Group, VinBrain, Vinmec, VinBigdata, VinAI.

### December, 2020

VinUniversity reached agreements with reputable academic and corporate partners in Vietnam as well as in the world in faculty exchange, internship, employment, and joint research: the University of California, San Diego, University of Illinois at Urbana Champaign, POSTECH, Ernst & Young Vietnam, 108 Military Central Hospital, Vietnam National Children's Hospital, and so on.

### October, 2020

The First Convocation of the first academic year 2020-2021 at VinUniversity marked the anniversary of opening the first talented and not for profit private university in Vietnam.

### September, 2020

VinUni initiated the Study Away program through which VinUni has hosted 30 students from Cornell University and the University of Technology Sydney (UTS) who were not able to travel to their home universities due to the pandemic.

### September, 2020

VinUniversity reached agreements with Cornell University, University of Technology Sydney and Yonsei School of Business on the exchanges of students offering opportunities for VinUni students to go for exchange at these universities.

### July, 2020

The Minister of Education and Training of Vietnam granted the operating license officially allowing VinUniversity to offer academic programs.

### July, 2020

VinUniversity and Cornell University signed an agreement to provide Cornell students with a Study Away option at VinUni Campus.

### June, 2020

The University Admission Scheme for Academic Year 2020-2021 has been approved by the Ministry of Education and Training for Undergraduate Programs.

### May, 2020

VinUniversity and VinAI Research signed an agreement to collaborate in training, scientific research, and the exchange of human resources, as well as sharing facilities.

### April, 2020

VinUniversity and Yonsei University (Korea) signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to cooperate in scientific research, academic events, the exchange of students and lecturers, and the QUIS Conference.

### February, 2020

The Ministry of Education and Training issued VinUniversity its operating license.

### February, 2020

VinUniversity signed an agreement with VinBrain to collaborate in the training and exchange of human resources and scientific research, as well as sharing facilities.

### January, 2020

VinUniversity's inauguration ceremony was held on its campus located at Vinhomes Ocean Park, Gia Lam, Hanoi.

### January, 2020

The University Council of VinUniversity was officially formed. The Founding Donor recognized Dr. Le Mai Lan as the University President, and Professor Rohit Verma as the Founding Provost.

2019

### December, 2019

The Prime Minister of Vietnam officially approved the establishment of VinUniversity, with an expected inaugural class of 300 students.

### November, 2019

VinUniversity Project announced the admission directives for the academic year 2020 - 2021, with three colleges: Business & Management, Health Sciences, and Engineering & Computer Science.

2018

### November, 2018

Vingroup began construction of the VinUniversity campus.

### April, 2018

Vingroup officially signed a collaboration contract with Cornell University and the University of Pennsylvania, two of the top 20 universities in the world.

### March, 2018

Vingroup announced its plan to enter the field of higher education under the name of VinUniversity.

2017

### July, 2017

Vingroup approved the 30-year strategic master plan to build VinUniversity to become a world-class university, fostering and developing talents for future.

2016

### February, 2016

Vingroup engaged Parthenon (E&Y) and Oxford Innovation (Oxford University) as international consultants to develop a feasibility plan to establish a brand new university, which is expected to be a breakthrough in higher education in Vietnam.

Next

Previous

### January, 2025

VinUniversity received a Certificate of Commendation from the Minister of Education and Training in recognition of its outstanding achievements and contributions in scientific research and application. This honor highlights the university’s strong commitment to academic excellence and its strategic emphasis on impactful research that delivers practical, meaningful solutions for the community and society.

### March, 2025

On March 13, VinUniversity and Nanyang Technological University (NTU) signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to establish a strategic, comprehensive, and long-term partnership. The collaboration will focus on key areas including Computer Science, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence, Engineering, Robotics, Materials Science, and Health Sciences, implemented through six action programs: faculty exchange, joint research centers and groups, recruitment of postdoctoral fellows and PhD students, co-organization of scientific and technological conferences, and the development of research laboratory infrastructure.

### March, 2025

VinUniversity has officially been awarded the FIBAA Quality Seal by the FIBAA
Accreditation and Certification Committee of the Foundation for International Business
Administration Accreditation, becoming the first university in Vietnam to fully meet
100% of the quality criteria, with 40% of these criteria exceeding the required standards,
particularly in Research, where 5 out of 6 criteria surpassed expectations.

### June, 2025

VinUniversity officially announced its second-phase development strategy, with the ambitious vision of becoming one of the world’s top 100 universities. VinUniversity’s phase 2 strategy is built on two core pillars: enhancing academic and research infrastructure while strengthening academic talent to meet global benchmarks. At its core is the “VinUni 500” program, which aims to recruit 500 outstanding global scholars and faculty members, supported by Vingroup’s investment of 9,300 billion VND to expand training capacity and cultivate an world-class research ecosystem in Vietnam.

### October, 2025

Joining forces for Community Health: VinUniversity, Vinmec and Hanoi Medical
University have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) under the witness of
the Minister of Health, marking an important milestone in building a comprehensive
and internationally aligned healthcare ecosystem in Vietnam. The agreement focuses
on education, research, workforce development and expanded clinical training while
promoting joint research in cutting edge medical technologies such as AI, robotics,
and big data.

### November, 2025

VinUniversity was honored with a Certificate of Commendation from the Minister of Education and Training for its exceptional accomplishments in the emulation movement for innovation in management, teaching, and learning during the 2020–2025 period. This recognition affirms VinUniversity’s unwavering efforts to cultivate an exceptional academic environment and its contributions to nurturing high-caliber talent for Vietnam and the world.

VinUniversity’s 3D Medical Technology Center (3D Lab) has officially earned ISO
9001:2015 and ISO 13485:2016 certifications from ISOCERT, making it one of the
few units in Vietnam to achieve international standards in producing 3D- printed
medical devices. This milestone affirms the quality and reliability of the lab’s products,
from 3D anatomical models to fully personalized implants while strengthening its role
in supporting medical training, research and personalized medical practices.

### September, 2024

VinUniversity has officially been awarded a 5-star university rating by Quacquarelli
Symonds (QS), becoming the youngest and fastest university in the world to achieve
this distinction. This important milestone reflects the university’s vision for
transforming higher education in Vietnam, striving toward global standards within 30
years, developing high-quality human resources, and contributing to the knowledgebased economy.

### October, 2024

VinUniversity became the first UNESCO Chair in Vietnam, focusing on environment,
cultural heritage and biodiversity in the country. During the 2024-2028 term, VinUniversity
focuses on research aimed at heritage conservation, biodiversity documentation and the
digitisation of indigenous knowledge through the Metaverse (virtual reality) platform,
transforming it into online learning resources that can be shared widely across Vietnam
and the global community.

2023

### December, 2023

VinUniversity signed a memorandum of understanding with the State Agency for Technology Innovation - Ministry of Science and Technology to promote innovative activities, human resource training, and the development of indices for innovation management and solutions for science and technology management in key national economic sectors.

### December, 2023

VinUniversity signed a memorandum of understanding with Saïd Business School - University of Oxford (ranked #1 in the world according to Times Higher Education rankings) for comprehensive collaboration in training, research, student experience, consulting, and entrepreneurship.

### December, 2023

VinUniversity's VinHeritage Metaverse Museum won third prize at the prestigious QS Reimagine Education Awards 2023 in the category of "Immersive Experiential Learning". It also received the "Outstanding Digital Content Product in Education" Award from the Vietnam

### September, 2023

VinUniversity's Center for Environmental Intelligence received a $250,000 grant from the U.S. National Science Foundation for an initiative called “Global Center for Climate Risk and Resilience: Southeast Asia as a Living Lab” (SEALL).

### July, 2023

VinUniversity's College of Health Sciences was proud to be one of the only two universities in Southeast Asia to achieve ACGME-I international quality accreditation.

### July, 2023

VinUniversity hosted the World Schools Debating Championship (WSDC) 2023 from July 20 to 27, with 65 teams representing 65 countries.

### June, 2023

Over 150 world-renowned professors and scientists from 90 universities, representing 28 countries gathered at VinUni for the 18th International Research Conference on Service Excellence in Management (QUIS18).

### May, 2023

VinUniversity-Illinois Smart Health Center (VISHC) received the Excellence in Sustainable Development Award 2023 from ISCN.

### May, 2023

VinUniversity opened the first Advanced Imaging Education Center (AIEC) in Viet Nam. AIEC was built in accordance with international standards with world leading experts from the UK, USA, Australia... to create an advanced training model that can overcome the limitations of traditional methods.

### April, 2023

To celebrate 5 years of close collaboration with Cornell University (#20 in the world), VinUniversity launched the VinUni-Cornell Knowledge Hub with an aim to promote a culture of lifelong learning.

### April, 2023

VinUniversity offers residency training programs in Orthopaedics that meet international standards, bringing the total number of resident doctor programs to 4 specialties.

### January, 2023

3D Technology in Medicine Center, VinUni was one of the first 3D laboratories in Vietnam to achieve ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management System) and ISO 13485:2016 (Quality Management System for Medical Devices) certification.

2022

### October, 2022

VinUniversity Medical Simulation Center received Provisional Accreditation by the Society for Simulation in Healthcare (SSH) - the world's largest accreditation organization specializing in healthcare simulation training.

### October, 2022

VinUniversity was the youngest university in the Asia-Pacific region to receive 5-Star QS (Quacquarelli Symonds) ratings in 7 categories after only 2 years in operation.

### October, 2022

VinUniversity launched the physical Entrepreneur Lab (E Lab) and celebrated Entrepreneurship Week.

### October, 2022

The College of Business & Management appointed 02 Academic Chairs, who are well-respected professors in their respective fields, and 02 Industry Chairs, who are industry leaders, entrepreneurs, as well as strong advocates for education and nurturing talents.

### September, 2022

VinUniversity College of Business & Management and College of Arts & Sciences signed a cooperation agreement with the Chief of Sales and Marketing Officer Association Vietnam.

### September, 2022

VinUniversity College of Health Sciences and the University of Minnesota School of Nursing (USA) signed a cooperation agreement on academic cooperation and exchange.

### September, 2022

VAIPE - A Smart Healthcare System for Vietnamese People, developed by the research team at VinUni-Illinois Smart Health Center and partners, was announced as one of the winners of the AI Awards 2022.

### August, 2022

VinUniversity signed a cooperation agreement with the University of Queensland (UQ) in Australia for the launching of the integrated Bachelor’s-Master’s Degree program for students at the College of Engineering & Computer Science.

### August, 2022

VinUniversity Nursing Program was eligible to pursue ACEN (U.S.) Candidacy. ACEN is recognized as the leading authority on nursing education accreditation worldwide.

### July, 2022

VinUniversity and the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign announced the opening of the VinUni-Illinois Smart Health Center (VISHC), which focuses on interdisciplinary research in biotechnology and data science. VISHC was officially given 13,5 million USD in funding from Vingroup.

### July, 2022

VinUniversity announced its first Ph.D. in Computer Science program for the academic year 2022-2023, focusing on future technology with major impacts.

### July, 2022

VinUniversity reached agreements with Meliá International Hotels Group, KPMG - one of the world’s four leading auditing firms, and Tiki - Vietnam’s leading e-trade company, providing students with opportunities to experience "real learning - real practice" in the corporate environment.

### June, 2022

Under Vingroup’s "Science and Technology Scholarship Program for Overseas Studies for Master’s and Doctoral Degrees", a scholarship award ceremony for 30 Master's and Doctoral students for the 2022 academic year was held with the announcement of the launching of Vingroup Young Scholars’ Global Network.

### June, 2022

VinUniversity hosted the 1st Annual "Teaching and Learning Summit''. The event focused on innovation in teaching and learning, to reshape Vietnamese higher education in the 21st century.

### June, 2022

Vingroup announced its membership in the Massachusetts Institute of Technology’s (MIT) prestigious Industrial Liaison Program (ILP). VinUniversity will work closely with ILP experts and MIT researchers to promote research and technology development.

### June, 2022

VinUni reached agreements on the integrated Bachelor’s - Master’s program with Penn Engineering, the University of Pennsylvania, and the University of Technology Sydney for students of the College of Engineering and Computer Science.

### May, 2022

VinUniversity Entrepreneurship Lab, together with UpYouth, held TechYouth Startup Day and announced the Incubator Program to support students’ tech startup projects.

### April, 2022

VinUniversity held its first Career Day, with the participation of well-respected businesses like EY, KPMG, Toyota, Corning, AON, Salesforce, SSI, ACB, Viettel, and FPT, together with leading companies in the Vingroup ecosystem - VinFast, Vinhomes, Vinmec, and VinAI.

### April, 2022

VinUniversity signed agreements on Student Exchange programs with the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology in Lausanne, Nyenrode Business University in the Netherlands, Pohang University of Science and Technology in South Korea, University of Toronto - Canada, and Hong Kong University of Science and Technology.

### March, 2022

VinUniversity successfully signed agreements with leading businesses, namely InterContinental Hotels, Techcombank, Woori Bank, FPT Telecom, Vinschool, Vincom Retail, and Vinhomes. Simultaneously, VinUniversity also reached agreements on integrated Bachelor’s - Master’s programs with the University of California San Diego, the USA, and the University of Queensland, Australia.

### February, 2022

Two VinUniversity-funded projects in response to smart healthcare service and smart lighting technology, won research awards totaling 9 billion VND from VinIF.

### January, 2022

VinUniversity and Vincom Center For Contemporary Art (VCCA) hosted the “Future of Time” Art Workshop and Showcase, welcoming the presence of the Winners of the VinFuture Prize on its opening day.

### January, 2022

VinUniversity opened Vietnam’s first Research Center for Biomedical 3D Printing to research and apply the world's latest 3D printing technology in the production of surgical biomedical materials, as well as models for teaching and research.

### January, 2022

VinUniversity and Vietnam-Cambodia Marriott Business Council signed a cooperation agreement on human resources development for the tourism - hospitality industry.

2021

### November, 2021

VinUniversity and Vinmec held a celebration for the first two years of the VinUni - Vinmec alliance as well as appointed the next 60 experts and clinical professionals as new affiliated faculty.

### August, 2021

VinUniversity successfully reached cooperation agreements on the integrated Bachelor’s - Master’s program with University of Pennsylvania, Cornell University, University of California, San Diego, University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, University of Technology Sydney, Australia.

### July, 2021

VinUniversity Global Case Competition (VGCC) 2021 was officially launched. This is an annual competition organized by VinUniversity with support from Cornell University, in order to provide a platform for students to work on real-life problems.

### May, 2021

VinUni’s College of Business and Management established the Industry Advisory Board (IAB). The first 8 members of the IAB are all high-level leaders at leading corporations, including Chairwoman; Chief Executive Officer; Managing Director;… The College of Business and Management has offered many programs to give students the most comprehensive experience of the real professional work environment. These include Industry Speaker Series, Industry Mentorship Program, 5 in 5 Internship, Summer Internship, etc

### February, 2021

VinUni granted funding to 16 Seed-Funding projects in AY 2020-2021. Among these 16 projects, at least 13 projects involved international collaboration.

2020

### December, 2020

In the AY 2020-2021, VinUniversity continued to reach agreements with other leading universities such as Yonsei University, Seoul National University, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology in Lausanne, Western University, University of Technology Sydney. VinUniversity has also signed a cooperation agreement with Vingroup subsidiaries, namely Vinpearl, VinHMS, One Mount Group, VinBrain, Vinmec, VinBigdata, VinAI.

### December, 2020

VinUniversity reached agreements with reputable academic and corporate partners in Vietnam as well as in the world in faculty exchange, internship, employment, and joint research: the University of California, San Diego, University of Illinois at Urbana Champaign, POSTECH, Ernst & Young Vietnam, 108 Military Central Hospital, Vietnam National Children's Hospital, and so on.

### October, 2020

The First Convocation of the first academic year 2020-2021 at VinUniversity marked the anniversary of opening the first talented and not for profit private university in Vietnam.

### September, 2020

VinUni initiated the Study Away program through which VinUni has hosted 30 students from Cornell University and the University of Technology Sydney (UTS) who were not able to travel to their home universities due to the pandemic.

### September, 2020

VinUniversity reached agreements with Cornell University, University of Technology Sydney and Yonsei School of Business on the exchanges of students offering opportunities for VinUni students to go for exchange at these universities.

### July, 2020

The Minister of Education and Training of Vietnam granted the operating license officially allowing VinUniversity to offer academic programs.

### July, 2020

VinUniversity and Cornell University signed an agreement to provide Cornell students with a Study Away option at VinUni Campus.

### June, 2020

The University Admission Scheme for Academic Year 2020-2021 has been approved by the Ministry of Education and Training for Undergraduate Programs.

### May, 2020

VinUniversity and VinAI Research signed an agreement to collaborate in training, scientific research, and the exchange of human resources, as well as sharing facilities.

### April, 2020

VinUniversity and Yonsei University (Korea) signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to cooperate in scientific research, academic events, the exchange of students and lecturers, and the QUIS Conference.

### February, 2020

The Ministry of Education and Training issued VinUniversity its operating license.

### February, 2020

VinUniversity signed an agreement with VinBrain to collaborate in the training and exchange of human resources and scientific research, as well as sharing facilities.

### January, 2020

VinUniversity's inauguration ceremony was held on its campus located at Vinhomes Ocean Park, Gia Lam, Hanoi.

### January, 2020

The University Council of VinUniversity was officially formed. The Founding Donor recognized Dr. Le Mai Lan as the University President, and Professor Rohit Verma as the Founding Provost.

2019

### December, 2019

The Prime Minister of Vietnam officially approved the establishment of VinUniversity, with an expected inaugural class of 300 students.

### November, 2019

VinUniversity Project announced the admission directives for the academic year 2020 - 2021, with three colleges: Business & Management, Health Sciences, and Engineering & Computer Science.

2018

### November, 2018

Vingroup began construction of the VinUniversity campus.

### April, 2018

Vingroup officially signed a collaboration contract with Cornell University and the University of Pennsylvania, two of the top 20 universities in the world.

### March, 2018

Vingroup announced its plan to enter the field of higher education under the name of VinUniversity.

2017

### July, 2017

Vingroup approved the 30-year strategic master plan to build VinUniversity to become a world-class university, fostering and developing talents for future.

2016

### February, 2016

Vingroup engaged Parthenon (E&Y) and Oxford Innovation (Oxford University) as international consultants to develop a feasibility plan to establish a brand new university, which is expected to be a breakthrough in higher education in Vietnam.

Next

Previous

### January, 2025

VinUniversity received a Certificate of Commendation from the Minister of Education and Training in recognition of its outstanding achievements and contributions in scientific research and application. This honor highlights the university’s strong commitment to academic excellence and its strategic emphasis on impactful research that delivers practical, meaningful solutions for the community and society.

### March, 2025

On March 13, VinUniversity and Nanyang Technological University (NTU) signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to establish a strategic, comprehensive, and long-term partnership. The collaboration will focus on key areas including Computer Science, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence, Engineering, Robotics, Materials Science, and Health Sciences, implemented through six action programs: faculty exchange, joint research centers and groups, recruitment of postdoctoral fellows and PhD students, co-organization of scientific and technological conferences, and the development of research laboratory infrastructure.

### March, 2025

VinUniversity has officially been awarded the FIBAA Quality Seal by the FIBAA
Accreditation and Certification Committee of the Foundation for International Business
Administration Accreditation, becoming the first university in Vietnam to fully meet
100% of the quality criteria, with 40% of these criteria exceeding the required standards,
particularly in Research, where 5 out of 6 criteria surpassed expectations.

### June, 2025

VinUniversity officially announced its second-phase development strategy, with the ambitious vision of becoming one of the world’s top 100 universities. VinUniversity’s phase 2 strategy is built on two core pillars: enhancing academic and research infrastructure while strengthening academic talent to meet global benchmarks. At its core is the “VinUni 500” program, which aims to recruit 500 outstanding global scholars and faculty members, supported by Vingroup’s investment of 9,300 billion VND to expand training capacity and cultivate an world-class research ecosystem in Vietnam.

### October, 2025

Joining forces for Community Health: VinUniversity, Vinmec and Hanoi Medical
University have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) under the witness of
the Minister of Health, marking an important milestone in building a comprehensive
and internationally aligned healthcare ecosystem in Vietnam. The agreement focuses
on education, research, workforce development and expanded clinical training while
promoting joint research in cutting edge medical technologies such as AI, robotics,
and big data.

### November, 2025

VinUniversity was honored with a Certificate of Commendation from the Minister of Education and Training for its exceptional accomplishments in the emulation movement for innovation in management, teaching, and learning during the 2020–2025 period. This recognition affirms VinUniversity’s unwavering efforts to cultivate an exceptional academic environment and its contributions to nurturing high-caliber talent for Vietnam and the world.
